channel.title: Meditation on Eau Claire Buddhist Sangha
channel.description: Recent content in Meditation on Eau Claire Buddhist Sangha

item.title: Tips for Meditation Posture
item.description:
After struggling with lower back pain during sits for almost two years, I’ve finally found a setup that works. Thought I’d share in case it helps others.

What helped me

  1. A higher cushion — I switched from a standard zafu to a taller one (about 6 inches). This tilted my pelvis forward enough that my spine could stack naturally.

  2. A folded blanket under my knees — For those of us who sit cross-legged, a little support under the knees takes pressure off the hips.

item.title: Weekly Tuesday Sit & Dharma Talk
item.description:
Our core weekly gathering. We begin with 30 minutes of silent meditation, followed by a talk on “The Second Noble Truth: The Cause of Suffering”.

Schedule

  • 6:45 PM - Optional meditation instruction for beginners
  • 7:00 PM - Silent sitting meditation (30 minutes)
  • 7:30 PM - Dharma talk or discussion
  • 8:00 PM - Tea and open discussion

All levels of experience are welcome. Cushions and chairs are provided. No special clothing needed.
